Query
  Pipeline
    From
      Source main
      SugarTerms
        KeyValue level=
          Ident error
    Stage stats
      Aggs
        Agg
          Call count
        Agg
          Call avg
            Ident duration
      By
        Ident source
        Call bin
          Ident _time
          Duration 5m
    Stage materialize
      Name "mv_errors_5m"
      Retention
        Duration 90d
